subcodes.first_line: Hath the Book been revealed in truth? Say: Yea, by the Lord of all worlds! Hath the Call been raised through grace? Say: Yea, if thou be of them that know [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هل الکتاب ظهر بالحق قل ای و رب العالمین هل الندآء ارتفع بالفضل قل ای ان انت من العارفین
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
